items.title: Step by Step Guide to Build and Compare FedAvg and FedProx Federated Learning on Non-IID CIFAR-10 with NVIDIA FLARE
items.summary: In this tutorial, we build an advanced federated learning experiment with NVIDIA FLARE. We compare FedAvg and FedProx on a non-IID CIFAR-10 setup, where client data is split using a Dirichlet distribution to simulate realistic label imbalance...

items.title: WorkOS Releases auth.md: An Open Agent Registration Protocol Built on OAuth Standards
